title: Bagakit De-AI-Tone Rewrite Quality Eval
description: Qualitative eval cases for bagakit-writing-de-ai-tone rewrite work. The cases test issue detection, protected-span preservation, scene fit, rewrite quality, evidence preservation, second-pass audit, and minimal-edit judgment.

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone rewrite for the source text in reference_state.source_text. Use profile internal-share and scene status. Return issues found, protected spans, rewritten version, change summary, and second-pass audit. Preserve the date, owner, metric, and file path exactly. Do not turn the update into public-marketing prose.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer removes formulaic opening, process filler, fake contrast, vague authority, unsupported people-generalization, and empty future-facing polish while preserving accountability: the owner, date, metric movement, and file path survive unchanged. Because the source only has generic future-facing polish, it should remove or call out that ending rather than inventing a next step. The rewrite should sound like an internal peer update, not a campaign note.
items.notes_for_human_review: Penalize fact drift, erased ownership, softened metrics, and a rewrite that keeps the staged binary frame. Reward concise sequencing and a second-pass audit that checks protected spans.

reference_state.source_text:
# 本周进展

随着 AI 协作能力的不断发展，我们通过统一能力进行分析，从而打通研发链路，进而赋能业务闭环。业内人士指出，这具有里程碑式的意义。

2026-07-07，@Ming 完成了 `docs/specs/runtime-surface-contract.md` 的验证，失败率从 18% 降到 7%。这不是工具问题，而是底层逻辑问题。很多团队会把它写成该做 vs 不该做。

接下来我们将持续优化，未来可期。

rubric.detection_precision: Identifies the high-signal AI-tone issues without treating the concrete progress facts as the problem.
rubric.scene_fit: Uses internal status-update prose with visible owner, sequence, and no marketing polish; it does not invent a next action when the source only has a generic ending.
rubric.rewrite_quality: Rebuilds the paragraph around the real progress and removes fake contrast instead of swapping synonyms.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Explicitly checks protected spans, fact survival, and whether blocking AI-tone remains.

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone rewrite for reference_state.source_text. Use profile technical and scene technical. Keep commands, paths, API symbols, versions, dates, and metrics exact. Reduce AI-tone around the technical facts, but do not cosmetically paraphrase precise technical terms.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer keeps the command, file path, API symbol, version, date, p95 numbers, and technical nouns intact. It removes formulaic framing and process filler while preserving the docs-oriented sequence and making clear which check should run before release.
items.notes_for_human_review: This case is mostly a protected-span trap. Penalize any rewrite that changes flags, paths, versions, API symbols, or metrics. Also penalize over-humanized prose that makes the instruction less exact.

reference_state.source_text:
# Release note

随着平台能力的不断发展，我们需要进行优化，确保 docs pipeline 更加 robust。

Before release, run `bash skills/paperwork/bagakit-writing-de-ai-tone/scripts/bagakit-writing-de-ai-tone-cli.sh lint --profile technical --scene technical --fail-on none docs/api.md`.

The API `docs.documents.create` stays on v2.3.1. On 2026-07-07, p95 moved from 180ms to 120ms after `docs/api.md` stopped rebuilding unchanged sections.

rubric.detection_precision: Flags formulaic and filler prose while allowing precise technical terms under the technical profile.
rubric.protected_span_integrity: Preserves the shell command, `docs.documents.create`, v2.3.1, 2026-07-07, 180ms, 120ms, and `docs/api.md` exactly.
rubric.scene_fit: Keeps the result as a technical release note or docs instruction rather than making it chatty.
rubric.rewrite_quality: Removes filler around the release check and latency fact without adding unsupported rationale.
rubric.evidence_preservation: Keeps the before/after metric and cause relationship visible.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Audits command, API, path, version, date, and metrics after rewriting.

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone rewrite for reference_state.source_text. Use profile business and scene public-writing. Preserve the release date, metric, URL, and product name. Remove hype, vague authority, fake contrast, and generic transition scaffolding. Keep the output suitable for a public product update.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer rewrites the update into a grounded public note: what shipped, what changed, who it helps, and what evidence supports the claim. It preserves NovaFlow, 2026-07-07, 42%, and the URL exactly while removing game-changer language and vague experts.
items.notes_for_human_review: Look for whether the agent replaces hype with concrete scope. Penalize invented customer evidence, changed metrics, and a rewrite that becomes too dry to publish.

reference_state.source_text:
# NovaFlow update

In today's rapidly evolving AI landscape, NovaFlow is a game-changer for modern teams. This is not a dashboard but a full ecosystem. Moreover, experts believe this marks a watershed moment for operational excellence.

Released on 2026-07-07, the workflow view reduced handoffs by 42% in the pilot. Details: https://example.com/novaflow/pilot.

rubric.detection_precision: Finds the hype, vague authority, formulaic opening, and fake contrast without attacking the real pilot result.
rubric.scene_fit: Produces public product-update prose with clear scope and no internal-only shorthand.
rubric.rewrite_quality: Replaces hype with concrete release value and keeps the paragraph readable.
rubric.evidence_preservation: Keeps the pilot metric and link as the proof surface instead of replacing them with vague authority.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Checks protected spans, hype removal, and whether claims remain source-bound.

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone rewrite-plan style pass for reference_state.source_text. Use profile business and scene public-writing. Preserve the product label, quoted source excerpt, and URL exactly. Treat the hype inside the quote as source material, not as the author's own prose. If the draft lacks evidence for a replacement claim, mark an evidence gap instead of inventing customers, audience segments, benchmarks, examples, or source facts.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer flags the author's process filler outside the quote, preserves Product: AcmeCopilot, the full quoted source excerpt, and the URL, and says the quoted hype should be assessed or replaced only with provided evidence. It does not infer a customer group, add a benchmark, or turn the vendor quote into Bagakit's own claim.
items.notes_for_human_review: This case tests the boundary between protected quoted source material and the author's prose. Penalize any answer that edits the quote, treats quoted hype as a blocking author finding, or fills the evidence gap with invented customer or audience facts.

reference_state.source_text:
# Vendor quote review

Product: AcmeCopilot

Source: "In today's rapidly evolving landscape, AcmeCopilot is a game-changer and experts believe it marks a watershed moment."

The draft says we should 进行分析 before writing our own claim. Details: https://example.com/acme/source.

rubric.detection_precision: Flags only the author's process filler while leaving AI-toned words inside protected quoted source material out of blocking findings.
rubric.protected_span_integrity: Preserves Product: AcmeCopilot, the quoted source sentence, and https://example.com/acme/source exactly.
rubric.scene_fit: Keeps the response suitable for public-writing review without inventing a target audience or campaign framing.
rubric.rewrite_quality: Plans a rewrite around evidence actually present and separates source assessment from author prose edits.
rubric.evidence_preservation: Marks a clear evidence gap when no source supports a replacement customer, benchmark, or example claim.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Checks quote survival, product-label survival, URL survival, and absence of fabricated evidence.

red_flags: forbidden quoted hype flagged as author prose

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone rewrite for reference_state.source_text. Use profile blog and scene public-writing. Remove conflict-bait binary framing and unsupported people-generalization. Preserve the concrete failure mode and turn the note into a useful decision boundary.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer removes staged binaries like old path versus new path and collapse versus dignity. It rewrites around the actual operational boundary: rollout should mean verified release readiness, not merely publishing. It should not sneer at vague groups.
items.notes_for_human_review: This case tests whether the agent can keep useful tension without dunking on imaginary opponents. Penalize punchier but still binary rewrites.

reference_state.source_text:
# Rollout 的老路 vs 新路

大多数团队会把 rollout 写成发布公告，这其实是塌方式还是体面的区别。不是流程问题，而是认知问题。

真正的边界是：如果验证没有完成，发布只是在扩大未知；如果验证完成，发布才是在交付结果。

rubric.detection_precision: Identifies fake contrast, binary conflict bait, and unsupported group generalization.
rubric.scene_fit: Keeps a public-writing shape without turning the piece into a harsh dunk or bland SOP.
rubric.rewrite_quality: Reframes the note around the actual rollout boundary rather than inventing a stronger conflict.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Checks that no staged binary or vague group dunk remains.

items.prompt: Run a de-AI-tone pass for reference_state.source_text. Use profile casual and scene chat. If the text is already strong, say so and avoid unnecessary edits. Preserve inline code, issue id, metric, and the two-step plan.
items.expected_outcome: A strong answer does not force a rewrite. It may offer one tiny clarity edit, but it should explicitly say the text has no blocking AI-tone issue. It preserves `syncUser()`, #482, 3 requests, and the sequence of today versus tomorrow.
items.notes_for_human_review: This case catches over-editing. Penalize agents that turn a clear short note into polished AI prose or remove the concrete debugging detail.

reference_state.source_text: 我倾向先不改 API。现在的失败点很具体：`syncUser()` 在 #482 的回放里会把 3 requests 合成 1 条日志。今天先补 fixture，明天再讨论抽象。

rubric.minimal_edit_judgment: Correctly says the note is already usable and avoids rewriting for its own sake.
rubric.scene_fit: Keeps the short chat-note shape and direct coordination tone.
rubric.evidence_preservation: Keeps the concrete failure mode and the today/tomorrow plan.
rubric.second_pass_audit: Checks that any suggested edit did not introduce polish or lose technical detail.
